ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number within a video sequence */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the image */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., indoor, outdoor, daytime, nighttime) */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the image is part of */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was captured */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was captured */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used to capture the image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the image (e.g., for categorization) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of training descriptors */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the descriptors were extracted from */,
  "num_descriptors" INTEGER /* Number of descriptors in the set */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the descriptors are associated with */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to extract the descriptors */,
  "descriptor_type" TEXT /* Type of descriptors (e.g., SIFT, SURF) */,
  "extraction_time" REAL /* Time taken to extract the descriptors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_descriptors_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_descriptors_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of query descriptors */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the descriptors were extracted from */,
  "num_descriptors" INTEGER /* Number of descriptors in the set */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the descriptors are associated with */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to extract the descriptors */,
  "descriptor_type" TEXT /* Type of descriptors (e.g., SIFT, SURF) */,
  "extraction_time" REAL /* Time taken to extract the descriptors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_descriptors_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_descriptors_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of matches */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor set the matches were found in */,
  "num_matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches found */,
  "min_distance" INTEGER /* Minimum distance between matches */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the matches are associated with */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to find the matches */,
  "match_time" REAL /* Time taken to find the matches */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES query_descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to create the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used */,
  "test_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test dataset used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_test_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the model version */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used */,
  "test_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test dataset used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was last updated */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_test_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, test) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the dataset */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the video */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the video file */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., indoor, outdoor, daytime, nighttime) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the video */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the video was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the video */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the video was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the video (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
